meta.notes: v2.7.1: Round 2 calibration complete. All TBD_round2 thresholds resolved. Adds trigger_precedence block, split signal_drift (sleeve/ticker), Brent 3-day cumulative trigger, turnover_clipped reporting flag. Prior: v2.7.0+structural_engine.

TREASURY_NOTE.notes: Treasury note must use live market pricing for Bucket A compliance checks. Hardcoded fallback price retained for system startup only. Compliance tolerance (acceptable deviation from par) TBD Round 2.

notes: Use residual cash to fund buys before generating any sells.
Sells-first refers to execution ordering only, after cash funding is applied.
Cash cannot satisfy sleeve floors or prevent hard cap enforcement; floors/caps still determine target weights.
If cash_available >= total_buys, then total_sells must be 0.

execution.notes: max_turnover (0.20) applies per rebalance event. max_turnover_stress (0.22) applies during soft_limit drawdown breach. max_turnover_annualized (0.60) is the binding annual ceiling — sufficient for two major portfolio rotations per year. turnover_reporting flags provide visibility when either cap is the operative constraint.

turnover_reporting.notes: Flags set to true at runtime when a rebalance is constrained by the annual or per-event turnover cap. Diagnostic telemetry only — does not block execution but requires acknowledgement in rebalance log.

trigger_precedence.description: When multiple triggers fire simultaneously, actions execute in this priority order. Higher-priority actions override or suspend lower-priority actions.

order.notes: Survival mode. Portfolio protection overrides all optimization.
Liquidity floor is non-negotiable. Restore before any rebalancing.

order.trigger: validators.l1_sleeve_caps OR validators.l2_sleeve_caps OR validators.l2_sleeve_floors OR validators.per_ticker_caps OR validators.per_ticker_floors
order.notes: Structural compliance. Caps and floors enforced before signal-driven trades.
If turnover cap binds, partial rebalance executed in priority order of violation severity.
Normal optimization. Executes only after all higher-priority constraints are satisfied.

lifecycle_rules.notes: Canonical intent: only inducted is allocatable. Activated is evaluation-only (non-allocatable), overlay is managed separately, reference is benchmark-only.

reference_to_inducted.notes: Ticker must pass observation period and show positive momentum before entering allocatable universe.

inducted_to_reference.notes: Demotion does not force immediate liquidation. Position winds down over exit_cycles.

re_entry_trigger.vix_trend_clause: TBD_round3: add VIX_5d_MA < VIX_20d_MA as alternative gate
re_entry_trigger.notes: VIX < 28 allows re-entry while market is elevated but not in panic. Intentionally more permissive than 25 to avoid missing face-ripping rallies in dormant names (particularly crypto) while VIX is falling from a peak. VIX trend clause (5d MA < 20d MA) to be added Round 3.

inducted_dormant.notes: Handles tickers that are inducted but not currently held (e.g. IBIT). Prevents discretionary re-entry without a signal.

any_to_activated.notes: Activated is a holding pen for tickers under review. Not allocatable.

ticker_constraints.notes: DEFAULT CONTRACT: Any ticker not explicitly present in ticker_constraints is reference-only (not held, not allocatable).

portfolio_accounting.notes: Contract: L1/L2 sleeve accounting uses only ticker_to_sleeves. Activated tickers intentionally omitted from ticker_to_sleeves do not affect sleeve cap/floor enforcement.

calendar.notes: Standing monthly rebalance regardless of band status.

band_breach.notes: Rebalance triggered when any tracked band is breached for hold_days_before_trigger consecutive days.

signal_drift.notes: Rebalance triggered when any sleeve drifts >5pp from target weight, or any ticker drifts >1.5pp from target weight. Both measured as absolute percentage point delta (actual minus target). Sleeve-level: e.g. ai_tech swelling from 32% to 37% triggers rebalance. Ticker-level: e.g. a 4%-capped ticker reaching 5.5% triggers trim.

stress_override.notes: Stress state suspends calendar and signal_drift triggers. Only band_breach enforcement continues.

cash_reserve.notes: Disabled: Bucket A is Treasuries-only; cash remains in Bucket B and may be idle.

stabilizers.notes: Non-allocatable overlay sleeve. Excluded from momentum + denominators; used for vol/drawdown shaping.

strategic_materials.notes: Strategic scarcity equities (uranium, rare earths, critical inputs). Pro-cyclical but geopolitically defensive.

managed_futures.notes: Overlay sleeve (DBMF, KMLM). Target split handled by overlays.managed_futures.

XLE.notes: XLE reclassified to geopolitical_stress_overlay per v2.7.0. band_total governed by overlays.geopolitical_stress.

QQQ.notes: Benchmark Proxy only (not held / not allocatable)

momentum_to_weight.notes: Momentum scores percentile-ranked over 63-day lookback within inducted universe. Rank maps linearly to target weight within [min_total, max_total] band. Linear scaling is the conservative baseline — revisit convex scaling in Round 3 once actual allocation output can be evaluated. Floor exit: reduce position to zero after 20 consecutive days of negative blend. Exit threshold (20d) intentionally longer than re-entry threshold (15d) — requires more conviction to exit than to re-enter.

condition_notes.brent_1d_pct_change_gte: 6% single-day Brent spike = acute supply shock (missile strike, port closure, sudden embargo). Catches the panic bid.
condition_notes.brent_3d_cumulative_pct_change_gte: 8% 3-day cumulative Brent move = sustained escalation (slow-rolling naval blockade, multi-day Hormuz disruption). Catches what the single-day threshold misses.
condition_notes.vix_inversion: Term structure inversion signals acute near-term panic premium.

geopolitical_trigger_definition.notes: ADVISORY ONLY. Trigger flags a review window; execution remains manual and discretionary within band_total [0.02, 0.06]. XLE position managed via GTC limit orders, not algorithmic execution.

geopolitical_stress.notes: XLE is a discretionary geopolitical hedge, not a systematic momentum allocation. Excluded from the allocation engine and denominator. Momentum score retained for situational awareness only — not used to drive weight. Band managed manually via GTC limit orders. Band thresholds TBD Round 2.

default_reference_contract.notes: Any ticker absent from ticker_constraints must be treated as reference-only via governance.defaults.ticker_constraints.

l1_sleeve_caps.notes: L1 sleeve totals must not exceed level1[sleeve].max_total.

l2_sleeve_caps.notes: L2 sleeve weights (as % of denominator) must not exceed level2[sleeve].cap.

l2_sleeve_floors.notes: L2 sleeve weights must not fall below level2[sleeve].floor.

per_ticker_caps.notes: Individual ticker weights (as % of total portfolio) must not exceed ticker_constraints[ticker].max_total.

per_ticker_floors.notes: Individual ticker weights must not fall below ticker_constraints[ticker].min_total.

per_ticker_bands.notes: Tickers with band_total must remain within [band_total[0], band_total[1]]. Currently: none (XLE moved to overlay).

funding_invariant.notes: Must hold for every rebalance event.

turnover_limit.notes: Warning on per-event breach (>20%). Error if annualized cap (60%) is projected to be breached within current calendar year. Sets turnover_reporting flags.

bucket_a_minimum.notes: Must use market price, not fixed fallback price, for this check.

drawdown_limit.notes: Soft breach triggers buy freeze. Hard breach triggers forced reduction to floors.

signal_staleness.notes: Warn if momentum signal inputs (price data) have not been updated within max_stale_days.

momentum_data_missing.notes: Warn if any inducted ticker has insufficient price history to compute momentum blend.

lifecycle_review_overdue.notes: Warn if any inducted ticker has not been reviewed within lifecycle_rules.review_days_default days.

rebalance_trigger_overdue.notes: Warn if calendar rebalance has not been acted upon within 3 business days of scheduled date (first Monday of month).

bucket_a_protected_liquidity.name: Bucket A — Protected Liquidity
bucket_a_protected_liquidity.excluded_assets: Cash does not satisfy Bucket A

allocatable_ex_bucket_a.notes: Bucket A excluded; cash included; overlays excluded.

objectives.notes: Primary: outperform VTI by ≥150bps net of estimated turnover costs. Cost model assumes 8bps per dollar traded (spread + slippage for liquid ETFs). Secondary: limit peak-to-trough drawdown per drawdown_rules.

drawdown_rules.notes: Soft limit (20%): freeze new buys, require manual review. Hard limit (28%): force reduction of all positions to sleeve floors. Recovery: resume normal rebalancing once drawdown < 12% for 10 consecutive days. 20% soft aligns with conventional bear market definition. 8pp gap (20→28) provides managed response window before hard limit fires.
